jobline.lineDescription: Size: 36mm x 80mm||Material: PE AP901||Print Colour: 6 Colour||Tool: D0892(3,7)(3,2)0.6mm Complex||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE VARNISH||MACHINE APPLIED||Supply: Rolls of 5,000||Qty: 140.000||||||5,000 x Aqua Black NEUTRAL BLACK C||5,000 x Aqua Yellow PANTONE 102 C||5,000 x Oil Baby Pink PANTONE 217 C||20,000 x Oil Black NEUTRAL BLACK C||5,000 x Oil Blush PANTONE 705 C||5,000 x Oil Candy PANTONE 218 C / TEXT PANTONE 217 C||5,000 x Oil Denim PANTONE 2137 C||5,000 x Oil Green PANTONE 2423 C||5,000 x Oil EU Hot Pink PANTONE 212 C||5,000 x Oil Latte PANTONE 482 C||5,000 x Oil Lavender - PANTONE 2092 C||5,000 x Oil Orange PANTONE 1575 C 5,000 x Oil EU Purple PANTONE 7677 C||5,000 x Oil Raspberry PANTONE 2040 C||20,000 x Oil Red PANTONE 1788 C||10,000 x Oil Royal PANTONE 2370 C||5,000 x Oil Sea Mist PANTONE 5503 C||5,000 x Oil Tiffany PANTONE 324 C||5,000 x Oil EU Violet PANTONE 272 C||5,000 x Oil Yellow PANTONE 102 C||5,000 x Oil Sage PANTONE 2404 C||||||Group discount applied||3mm gap||
jobline.deliveryToAddress: Temper Group ||47 Hargraves Avenue ||Albion Park Rail NSW 2527
